text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
People tend to forget this, but it's important to
remember...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Signature racewear isn't only for Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Shop Clerk
text_block_list.text: Welcome!

text_block_list.name: Shop Clerk
text_block_list.text:
O-okay... I believe we have all sizes in stock.
Um...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before the Tokyo Daishoten, the last big race of
the year...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: An orange jacket?! Trainer, that outfit...
choice_data_list: It's my signature racewear for the day.
It's my signature racewear for the day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the day of Copano Rickey's debut, we passed
through the orange gate together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As a tribute to that moment, I decided to wear
the same color today.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You did that for me? Thank you! ☆ How did you
know that today's lucky color is orange? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's just a coincidence. But maybe it's a sign that
the two of us are so on top of our game that we're
in perfect sync.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. I've been thinking, and...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae and Acute are both really strong. And I
am too. We're all at about the same level.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: You agree, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It goes without saying that all three of them are
incredibly formidable.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Right. That's why I...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I have to win here today. I can't just keep pace
with them.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If we remain on the same level, I won't be able to
achieve my dream.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Okay, let's go. The two of them are waiting for
me... not to mention the people who came to
cheer me on!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Rickey, you're here.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Say, Tarumae, Acute. I was just thinking...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
You know how you took some time off this year,
Tarumae? It seemed like you were in a tough
spot, but...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I knew that you'd get back on your feet, with
enough time. Because that's how strong you are.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: You think? Maybe you're right.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Acute, you're really strong too. You've been
running at the top level for a long time now.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: And me, running alongside you? I'm strong too.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
But that's why, if I just stay as I am now, I won't be
sending a message to anyone.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text: What do you mean, Rickey?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I'm using the power of feng shui, so if I can only
keep pace with you two... That's not a good
example, now is it?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: If I want people to truly believe in it, I have to become stronger than you.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I have to do it for those who are weaker than us.
Just by a little.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Those who are missing that last little bit of
courage, or who are just one step too far from
reaching their dream. If I can give them that last
push with feng shui...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
They just might be able to seize their own future.
So, if I want them to believe...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I can't just settle with being equal. I must become
the center that all the energy revolves around.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
From the eight trigrams to the Four Symbols.
From the Four Symbols to the Two Modes. And
with this race, from the Two Modes to the taiji.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
When I become the champion of dirt racing, when
I no longer have an equal, I think people will
finally believe that feng shui can make them
happy.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Rickey...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I understand now why Copano Rickey believes
she must beat Hokko Tarumae and Wonder
Acute.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Everything is in its rightful place. Both Tarumae
and Acute are at the top of their game, and the
venue is packed with fans.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
The Tokyo Daishoten is set up perfectly to
receive feng shui. If I win it...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
My message will ring out loud and clear! That
feng shui's power is unshakeable!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
So this is the day you've been waiting for, Rickey?
What you've been working toward, all this time?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
No, not exactly. It's just, so long as you take the
right path, and keep moving on ahead...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Everything else will fall into place around you.
And then, you'll find that all the hard work you've
put in will have been worth it.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Tarumae. Acute. Today, I came here to win, no
matter what.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I want to face you head-on and rise even higher!
Everything I've achieved—everything I've
learned—I'll make it shine with the power of feng
shui!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text: Rickey... Just know that I won't lose—I can't lose. I'm not letting you have the dirt champion's crown! But...

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
I've never seen you this confident and intense
before. Is that really you in there?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey has become the incarnation of the
sublime Azure Dragon. What's more...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When her qi reaches its peak, blue will shift to
yellow. Will the dragon's roar manage to pierce
the heavens?
